mapper.select: SELECT c.idColaborador, c.nombre, c.apellidoPaterno, c.apellidoMaterno, c.curp, c.correo, c.noPersonal, c.idRol, r.rol, c.numeroLicencia, c.idSucursal FROM colaborador c INNER JOIN rol r ON r.idRol = c.idRol WHERE c.noPersonal = #{usuario} AND c.password = #{password}

SELECT c.idColaborador, c.nombre, c.apellidoPaterno, c.apellidoMaterno, c.curp, c.correo, c.noPersonal, c.idRol, r.rol, c.numeroLicencia, c.idSucursal FROM colaborador c INNER JOIN rol r ON r.idRol = c.idRol WHERE c.noPersonal = #{usuario} AND c.password = #{password} AND c.idRol = 3
